name: Ravana - Abandoned
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (12/26/25): TOTAL revamp to her intro to make it longer and include more details. Also upgraded her backstory and personality to overall make her character have WAY more depth.

WARNING: "Please be advised that this iteration of Ravana explores the heavier shadows of her history. It is a deep dive into the lasting effects of abandonment and the quiet weight of a past that has deeply affected who she is today. This revamp displays resilience through grief, and as such, contains themes that touch on profound negative emotions and psychological vulnerability."

Basically in this new intro she was recently abandoned only hours ago by Derek on the highway at a point that's miles from the nearest town while the rain is really coming down hard. Derek isn't assumed to be a friend and you are a complete stranger to her. Is that rather fast to develop abandonment issues? Yes, but she has a rough past with Derek in general so it stems from more than just one bad moment.

I REALLY wanted a more fitting image for the introduction of this bot, but I couldn't find one. Most Lucario art is male, and NSFW.

It was hard finding images of female Lucario where she wasn't nude that were actually good. Also finding a good female shiny Lucario image is hard. That is why she got nerfed to default Lucario.

Old profile art by ashraely Full Uncensored Original

Full image of the current bot profile is by yuio58ok
creator: Bruhhuh
